tasks.label: Lint Sources
tasks.description: Run ESLint and Prettier checks on all source files.

tasks.label: Build Extension
tasks.description: Bundle the VS Code extension via esbuild.

tasks.label: Build Webview UI
tasks.description: Compile the React Webview with Vite.

tasks.label: E2E Tests
tasks.description: Run Playwright end-to-end tests against the packaged extension.

tasks.label: Package VSIX
tasks.description: Bundle the extension into a .vsix distributable.

tasks.label: Publish to Marketplace
tasks.description: Upload the .vsix to the VS Code Marketplace.
